summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stripe integration for HikmabyLM platform. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Admin panel pricing page UI tested via Playwright - CRUD operations for plans working correctly. Stripe checkout session creation returns valid URLs. All requested features verified.
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed plans created and cleaned up during tests. Existing plan 'course_test' preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe integration fully functional. Uses emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout library with sk_test_emergent key. Default plans (monthly 9.99€, annual 89.99€) returned when no custom plans exist. Admin panel pricing page at /api/admin-panel/pricing provides CRUD for plans and displays transactions table.

GET /api/plans.details: Returns default plans (monthly, annual) when no custom plans exist, returns custom plans from MongoDB otherwise

GET /api/admin/plans.details: Returns all plans from MongoDB (requires admin auth)

POST /api/admin/plans.details: Creates new plan with plan_id, name, price, duration_days, type, description. Rejects duplicates.

PUT /api/admin/plans/{plan_id}.details: Updates existing plan fields (name, price, duration_days, description, is_active)

DELETE /api/admin/plans/{plan_id}.details: Deletes plan. Returns 404 for non-existent plan.

POST /api/checkout/create.details: Creates Stripe checkout session. Returns valid URL starting with https://checkout.stripe.com and session_id starting with cs_test_. Supports plan_id, course_id, cursus_id.

GET /api/checkout/status/{session_id}.details: Returns session status (open/complete), payment_status (unpaid/paid), amount_total, currency, metadata

GET /api/user/access.details: Returns has_access=true for admin users with reason='admin_or_free'. Requires authentication.

GET /api/admin/transactions.details: Returns list of payment transactions with transaction_id, session_id, amount, product_name, status, payment_status, created_at

Admin Panel Pricing Page.details: Page loads at /api/admin-panel/pricing. Shows plans grid with 'Nouveau plan' button, plan cards with edit/delete buttons, transactions table. Modal form for create/edit works correctly.

ui_verifications.admin_login_page: ✅ Login form working, accepts credentials and redirects
ui_verifications.pricing_page_header: ✅ Title 'Tarification', description 'Gerez les abonnements et les achats uniques'
ui_verifications.plans_grid: ✅ Shows plan cards with name, price, duration, description, status, edit/delete buttons
ui_verifications.modal_form: ✅ All fields present: plan_id, name, price, duration_days, type, description
ui_verifications.create_plan: ✅ Toast 'Plan cree avec succes' shown, card added to grid
ui_verifications.delete_plan: ✅ Confirmation dialog works, toast 'Plan supprime' shown, card removed
ui_verifications.transactions_table: ✅ Shows date, user email, product name, amount, status columns

stripe_integration_notes.webhooks: Configured at /api/webhook/stripe but require real payment to fully test
